bird.name: Thick-billed cuckoo
bird.summary: The thick-billed cuckoo (Pachycoccyx audeberti) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is monotypic within the genus Pachycoccy…

locations.name: 几内亚
locations.summary: 几内亚共和國（法語：République de Guinée），通稱几内亚（Guinée），是位於西非的國家，東南接科特迪瓦，南臨利比里亞，西鄰塞拉利昂，北鄰几内亚比绍、塞内加尔，北和東北與馬里接壤。尼日尔河、塞内加尔河、冈比亚河在几内亚…

relations.subject: Thick-billed cuckoo
relations.evidence: The thick-billed cuckoo is found in humid to subhumid woodlands and gallery forests from Guinea in the northwest to Mozambique in the southeast, though it is absent from large areas of the Congo Basin.Johnsgard, Paul A.; The Avian Brood Parasites: Deception at the Nest; pp
